branch_activity_note.sync_strategy: git fetch origin main, initial fast-forward, then auditable no-ff merges when origin/main moved during remediation
branch_activity_note.note: This branch was created from local main, fast-forwarded to origin/main 7d3500918270 after the first platform governance audit, and later merged origin/main through 7d562788b05f after main moved during remediation. No force push was used and no default-branch edits were made directly.

closed_findings: P0 branch drift closed by fast-forward sync to origin/main before code changes
P1 evidence finalization requires accepted source submission attempt instead of merely valid attempt
P1 evidence finalization requires persisted retention lock evidence
P1 evidence finalization persists or replays authoritative evidence.finalized audit event
P1 audit pack export fails when evidence packages lack finalization audit timeline
P1 audit pack event query is exact-scoped to aggregate/package identifiers
P1 evidence package emits stable record_content_hash_sha256 independent of packaging timestamp
P1 direct released document creation requires release signature evidence or controlled import receipt
P1 group document distributions are not completed by one actor acknowledgement
P1 CR/CO API paths are role-gated and pass actor role context to lifecycle service
P1 CO release requires governance, release signature, conflict evaluation, and DB-visible side effects
P1 resulting objects cannot remain orphaned from affected objects after migration 128
P1 manufacturing timeline and production history reject caller-supplied scope
P1 as-manufactured query requires traceability role and authenticated session scope
P1 genealogy facts use content-bound source ids and replay-equivalence checks
P1 current as-manufactured snapshots are unique by subject
P1 EQMS control-plane OpenAPI contracts are documented and route parity is tested
P1 form submission acceptance has a portal-first e-signature transition
P1 CO release signature is validated against authoritative signature_events and release package hash
P1 deploy workflow verifies release manifest commit, change authority, tracking, and manifest hash before SSH deployment
